text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real paper "NormTab: Improving Symbolic Reasoning in LLMs Through Tabular Data Normalization" exists, but it was published at Findings of EMNLP **2024** (by Md Mahadi Hasan Nahid and Davood Rafiei), not EMNLP 2022, and the cited URL (https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-emnlp.203) actually points to a completely unrelated paper ("Probing for Incremental Parse States in Autoregressive Language Models"). The cited authors (Narayan, Tang, Nie, Zhang, etc.) are entirely fabricated — none of them are actual authors of NormTab.
LINK: https://aclanthology.org/2024.findings-emnlp.203/
